title: Sleep Hygiene Checklist
description: Review these evidence-based sleep hygiene rules. Check off each item you are currently following, then work on adding the unchecked ones over time.
instructions: Go through each item and honestly check off the ones you are consistently doing. The unchecked items become your improvement targets. Revisit this checklist weekly to track your progress.

items.label: I wake at the same time every day, including weekends
I get bright light exposure within 1 hour of waking
I exercise for 30+ minutes daily (but not within 4 hours of bedtime)
I limit caffeine and stop all caffeine intake by 2 PM
I avoid alcohol within 3 hours of bedtime
I finish eating 2-4 hours before bedtime
I dim the lights 1-2 hours before bed
I avoid screens 1 hour before bed (or use blue light filters)
I go to bed only when I feel sleepy
I leave the bed if I'm awake for more than 20 minutes
My bedroom temperature is set to 60-67°F (15.5-19.4°C)
My room is as dark as possible (blackout curtains, no LED lights)
My room is as quiet as possible (or I use white noise)
My mattress and pillows are comfortable and supportive
I use the bed only for sleep and intimacy (no work, TV, or phone)

disclaimer: This checklist is for educational purposes only. If you continue to have significant sleep problems after implementing these changes, consult a healthcare provider.
